data.body: ADDED (adversarial review): [Reliability] This story calls gh variable set to persist ACLI_VERSION and ACLI_SHA256. If gh CLI is unavailable or unauthenticated, this story must either (a) depend on Story d76e-33dd (fallback) and reuse its detection/fallback logic, or (b) define its own fallback for the gh variable set calls. Coordinate with Story d76e-33dd on the shared gh-availability check interface.
